_comment: Sentinel automation rule body. PUT to .../providers/Microsoft.SecurityInsights/automationRules/<new-guid>?api-version=2025-09-01 after substituting the <...> placeholders (see ./README.md). Binds the Security Copilot AI-triage playbook to the DET-004 (Mass resource deletion) analytic rule. order=2 so it runs alongside the order=1 mass-deletion-response containment-comment rule.

properties.displayName: DET-004 Mass deletion -> Security Copilot AI triage
